name: Zucchini Fritatta
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the zucchini and blanch for 5 minutes in boiling water. Drain.
2. Mix bread crumbs, milk, and lemon peel together. Blend with zucchini.
3. Whip the eggs, add water, and spices. Pour into a hot omelet pan greased with butter or oil.
4. When the eggs begin to set, top with the zucchini mixture.
5. Sprinkle with cheese and place under a hot broiler until slightly browned.
